D=function(D,V)return O(d,{D;V},a,J)end return D end,function(d,a)local J=B(a)local D=function()return O(d,{},a,J)end return D end,function(d,a)local J=B(a)local D=function(...)return O(d,{...},a,J)end return D end,function(d)for a=-871266-(-871267),#d,655522-655521 do y[d[a]]=y[d[a]]+(583866+-583865)end if D then local O=D(true)local J=f(O)J[a(732553+-704027)],J[a(131869+-103419)],J[a(-253133+281717)]=d,x,function()return 202876+-521417 end return O else return V({},{[a(-278088+306538)]=x;[a(-713585+742111)]=d;[a(-315880-(-344464))]=function()return 564515+-883056 end})end end return(R(4169047-(-957674),{}))(J(m))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[a(219518-191050)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
